command: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.
command_text: term-llm ask --no-session --text --stats --yolo --provider venice:claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 30 --agent ./agent --read-dir . --write-dir ./workspace -f ./SPEC.md "Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE."
prompt: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.

stats.raw: Stats: 51.1s (llm 48.1s + tool 3.0s) | 24k in (cache: 30k read) → 4.6k out (last: 12k→7) | 4 tools | 5 llm calls
